## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Governance / process
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Release

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check src tests`
- [ ] `pytest tests -q`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Not applicable (docs/templates only)

## Governance checklist

- [ ] Linked issue or explained why no issue is needed
- [ ] Updated docs for changed behavior, env vars, API, data layout, or release process
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, generated `data/`, `frontend/data/`, or `.next` files included
- [ ] Data-producing changes describe storage path, lineage/versioning, and retention impact
- [ ] API or schema changes include request/response notes
- [ ] Architecture changes include or update an ADR

## Notes for reviewers

-
